subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Breed home in Cambridge, 1912-05-23
subcodes.first_line: Scientific knowledge is the highest attainment upon the human plane, for science is the discoverer… This is 23 May, the anniversary of the message and Declaration of the Bab
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی امروز من بدارالفنون کلارک رفتم در شهر ووستر در آنجا خیلی جمعیت
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @harmony of science and religion, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @martyrdom of the Bab, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
